rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Cross-Defendant-Inintervention Victor Gess Motion To Quash Service (C.C.P. § 418.10)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT VICTOR GESS's Motion To Quash Service (C.C.P. § 418.10) DENIED. Victor Gess was served by a registered process server, entitled to presumption of propriety of service. Evidence submitted by Victor Gess fails to overcome the presumption. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SOFIA NEW ET AL VS. MANUEL LANGIT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File A Third Amended Cross Complaint & Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A Third Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 2. CROSS COMPLAINANTs MANUEL LANGIT, AURORA LANGIT's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File A Third Amended Cross Complaint GRANTED. No opposition filed. Third Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA BREWSTER VS. DIPAK PATEL ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 3. PLAINTIFF DWAYNE LEEKS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel prepare order. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to April 13, March 30, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to April 13, 2017 for moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint no later than March 30, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: TEACHERS INSURANCE AND ANNUITY ASSOC. OF VS. JENNIFER TONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Wage Garnishment Against Terry Tong, The Spouse Of Defendant And Judgment Debtor, Jennifer Tong
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 5. PLAINTIFF TEACHERS INSURANCE AND ANNUITY ASSOC.'s Motion For Wage Garnishment Against Terry Tong, The Spouse Of Defendant And Judgment Debtor, Jennifer Tong DENIED. No competent evidence provided that that Terry Tong, located on LinkedIn is the current spouse of the judgement debtor. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. ANDRES SUAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Order Plaintiff To Start Over For Violating The Terms Of The Agreement, With Default Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT ANN LEMBERG's Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement And Order Plaintiff To Start Over For Violating The Terms Of The Agreement, With Default Award OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice.= (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JUSTIN D'ORIO VS. TARA TOVREA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 7. DEFENDANT TARA TOVREA, QUINTEN FRY, THEO HONNIDAL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED, with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts giving rise to a requisite relationship that may be terminated by CCP 1161 notice. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that Civil Code § 827 notice creates a tenancy (where none previously existed) as alleged in the First Amended Complaint page 2 lines 4-7.= (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: VISTA DEL MONTE APARTMENTS, L.P. VS. KERMIT CALVIN HUTCHINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 8. PLAINTIFF VISTA DEL MONTE APARTMENTS, L.P.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT off calendar, settlement agreement on file. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LION SHARE INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. ARLENE R. BROWN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Special Appearance To Move To Quash Service Of Summons By Posting And Mailing; Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Posting And Mailing; Objection To Order For Posting And Mailing; Motion For Finding That Named Defendant Arlene R. Brown Has Not Appeared In The Action And That This Court Has No Jurisdiction Over Said Defendant; Memorandum Of Law.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 16, 2017, line 9. DEFENDANT ARLENE BROWN's Notice Of Special Appearance To Move To Quash Service Of Summons By Posting And Mailing; Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Posting And Mailing; Objection To Order For Posting And Mailing; Motion For Finding That Named Defendant Arlene R. Brown Has Not Appeared In The Action And That This Court Has No Jurisdiction Over Said Defendant; Memorandum Of Law. DENIED. Post and Mail service per February 23, 2017 Order is proper. = (501/AJR)
